name: GoTo
description: GoTo, formerly known as LogMeIn, is a leading provider of flexible-work software solutions designed to support remote and hybrid work environments. The company offers a comprehensive suite of communication and collaboration tools, including GoTo Meeting, GoTo Connect, and GoTo Resolve, which enable businesses to connect, collaborate, and provide IT support from anywhere. Headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, GoTo focuses on simplifying the complexities of modern work by delivering secure, reliable, and easy-to-use technology that empowers employees and IT professionals to stay productive and connected in an increasingly digital world.
